reason: Pi05 direct RoboLab policy server; 20-task rollout completed in phase 01.
Local RoboChallenge pi05/Table30v2 ALOHA checkpoint exists, but it is not a RoboLab Franka+Robotiq joint-position websocket policy.
ReKep is a keypoint/planner method and needs perception plus low-level controller adapters before RoboLab scoring.
RoboLab runner supports PaliGemma only if the matching openpi-assets-simeval checkpoint and config are present.
GR00T checkpoints are not currently exposed as a RoboLab Pi0-family websocket action policy.
Cosmos assets/checkpoints need task and action-schema adapter before Franka+Robotiq RoboLab rollout.
Qwen/Qwen-VL models are VLMs unless paired with a robot action head; not directly scoreable as RoboLab policy.
